title: Loan Against Property
tagline: Unlock the value of your property for bigger financial goals.
description: A Loan Against Property (LAP) lets you leverage your residential or commercial property to access larger loan amounts at lower interest rates compared to unsecured loans. Ideal for funding business expansion, education, medical needs, or debt consolidation.
features: Loan amounts up to ₹5 crore or 60–70% of property value*
Lower interest rates vs. personal loans
Property can continue to be used (no need to vacate)
Overdraft facility option from select lenders
Tax benefit applicable under certain usage conditions
eligibility: Property must be legally clear with valid title and registration
CIBIL score: 650 and above strongly recommended
Property should not be under dispute or litigation
